examples: Optimisation to reduce the VRAM usage in battles.
VRAM have to be big enough to manage all pixels on the screen.
So in order to get rid of this problem you need to increase your memory if possible a better VGA card with higher VRAM.
Under the hood, this guy packs an Intel Core 2 Duo, 8GB memory, an ATI Mobility Radeon HD GPU (up to 1GB DDR3 VRAM), and either a 500GB HDD or 64GB SSD.
